raw_text: sergi escribano undurraga time. time is the most valuable resource. im sergi escribano and i'm looking forward to investing my time on ambitious engineering projects in order to create a better world. vilanova i la geltrú, barcelona. +34 649 89 57 15 sergiescribanou@gmail.com linkedin.com/in/sergi-escribano-undurraga-51baaa146 education since 2018 2014-2018 2012-2014 ms: aerospace engineering. polytechnic university of catalonia - awarded with honors in the aerospace vehicles course. bsc: aerospace vehicles. polytechnic university of catalonia - 7/10 - best in class in the heat transfer course project. - voluntary courses on hpc, wind turbines and rocket science. - erasmus+ program participation at warsaw university of technology. - final dissertation: optimization of a propulsion system for satellite transfer from leo to geo. (a - 5/5) - combining hohmann and low thrust transfer for a gto compromising the payload deployed, the time expended and economic feasibility. baccalaureate of science and technology. ins joaquim mir 9.7/10 - awarded with a scholarship to fund my university first year. - comenius scholarship to study abroad in france for one term. professional experience since 2017 software developer control and analysis techniques (tca) develop virtual instrumentalization and software for atmospheric gas emissions analysis under the guidance of a senior software engineer. responsibilities - developing software for data acquisition of atmospheric gas emission. - weekly meeting to adjust client requirements with technical requirements. - elaboration of technical documentation. project examples - automatization of the medical gasses plant of carburos metálicos, s.a. - update of the register methods for 19 clients according to xeac normative. - software to control/monitor a co2 measurement experimental laboratory. sergi escribano undurraga sergiescribanou@gmail.com page 1 of 2 voluntary activities active member ofthe upc space program where participate in low cost engineering projects for academic and solidarity aims. 2016-2017 astronaut children - hab launch to photograph drawings from space. oversaw the structure for the camera. l assisted with the telemetry electronics. gps and iridium. 2017-2018 ares - light 2 stages rocket. participated in the electronic design. developed the 2nd stage ignition system and the parachute deployment. 2018-2019 ares il - heavy 2 stages rocket. lead the electronic design and taught the new members the know-how. 3d printed pieces reinforced using composites were used. software engineering tools dynamic, thermal and fluid computer simulations through matlab and c/c++. object-oriented programming with python and java. front end and user interface design of industrial applications through labview. unit testing tasks orientated to validate professional software projects. activex handling to create automatic reporting routines in excel. microsoft word and tex/latex for technical documentation. remote software maintenance assistance with teamviewer and anydesk. user experience in linux (ubuntu) to write and compile code. experience in pcb design through eagle. basic knowledge of cad design through solidworks. knowledge of fem for structural analysis through ansa. soft skills reinforced my responsibility and self-discipline during my daily work at tca. while combining my job and studies developed a huge flexibility in my work routines. strong teamwork and cooperation skills acquired participating at upc sp. languages e spanish, native e catalan, native e english, fluent e french, basic other acknowledgments am an amateur runner in long distance races. football coach experience and license. spanish drive license, b. gre scores: vr 158 (80" percentile) qr 160 (74* percentile). sergi escribano undurraga sergiescribanou@gmail.com page 2 of 2
